palette_hint: Deep navy background #0f1623 with primary text #e8edf5, accent teal #00c9a7 and warning amber #f5a623 for highlights and interactive states.
type_style: Headings in system-ui bold 600-700 weight at tight tracking, body in 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif at 13-14px regular weight — clinical, data-dense, dashboard feel.
description: Nexum Vault is a fictional enterprise secrets-management platform offering exhaustive account settings across profile identity, multi-factor security, subscription billing, granular notification preferences, and a full tamper-evident audit log.
constraints: Max content width 1280px centered with 24px horizontal padding; sidebar nav 220px fixed left with #141d2e background, main area fills remaining width with 28px internal padding.

All form inputs use border: 1px solid #2a3650, background #1a2438, text #e8edf5, border-radius 6px, padding 8px 12px; focus state switches border to #00c9a7 with box-shadow 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,201,167,0.18).

Custom checkboxes and radios are 16x16px squares/circles built with appearance:none, border 2px solid #2a3650, checked state fills with #00c9a7 and shows a white checkmark or dot via CSS; toggles are 40x22px pill shapes with sliding white 18px dot.

Data tables use background #111926 for odd rows, #141d2e for even rows (zebra), sticky thead with background #0f1623 and border-bottom 2px solid #00c9a7; numeric columns right-aligned in monospace font 'Courier New'.

Stat cards above each table are 4-column grid, each card 140px min-width, background linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2438 0%, #141d2e 100%), border 1px solid #2a3650, border-radius 10px, padding 16px 20px, with a 28px bold teal accent number and 11px uppercase label.

page_specs.profile: The Profile page contains a two-column form (left 340px avatar/identity block, right multi-section form) with sections for Personal Details (full name, display name, username, email, secondary email, phone, timezone select, locale select), Organization Details (company name, department, job title, employee ID, cost center), and Preferences (date format radio group, number format radio group, language select, theme toggle dark/light). A stat card strip above shows account age in days, total logins, profile completeness percentage, and last updated timestamp. Below the form sits a 6-column × 22-row Linked Identities table listing provider, linked email, linked date, last used, scope granted, and a revoke action column with styled danger buttons.
page_specs.security: The Security page opens with four stat cards showing active sessions count, failed login attempts (30 days), MFA methods configured, and days since last password change. The form is split into three sections: Password Change (current password, new password, confirm password with strength indicator bar, password hint text area), Multi-Factor Authentication (six method toggles for TOTP app, SMS, hardware key, backup codes, biometric, email OTP — each with a sub-label and enable/disable toggle), and Session Policy (session timeout select, concurrent session limit radio group, trusted device checkbox list with five predefined device types, remember-me duration select). Below sits a 7-column × 24-row Active Sessions table with columns for session ID in monospace, device type, browser, IP address, country, created timestamp, and last active timestamp with a terminate action.
page_specs.billing: The Billing page features stat cards for current plan tier, monthly spend, next invoice date, and accrued overages. The payment form has two sections: Payment Method (cardholder name, card number, expiry month select, expiry year select, CVV, billing address line 1, line 2, city, state/province select, postal code, country select, set-as-default checkbox) and Invoice Preferences (invoice email, PO number, VAT/tax ID, invoice language select, PDF format radio, auto-pay toggle, spending alert threshold number input, alert email). A 6-column × 25-row Invoice History table lists invoice number, issue date, due date, amount with right-aligned monospace formatting, status badge (paid/overdue/pending styled with color chips), and a download link column.
page_specs.notifications: The Notifications page has a stat card row showing total active rules, last notification sent timestamp, suppressed count this month, and pending delivery failures. The form is organized into four labeled fieldsets: Security Alerts (checkboxes for login from new device, password changed, MFA disabled, API key rotated, suspicious activity — each with a sub-description), Billing Events (checkboxes for invoice generated, payment failed, subscription renewed, trial expiring, usage threshold reached, overage incurred), Product Updates (radio group for all updates / major only / none, plus a digest frequency select), and Delivery Channels (email toggle with address input, SMS toggle with phone input, webhook toggle with URL input and secret field, Slack toggle with webhook URL, in-app toggle, digest time select, quiet hours start/end time inputs). A 6-column × 20-row Notification History table lists event ID, event type, channel, sent timestamp, delivery status with colored badges, and retry count in monospace.
page_specs.audit-log: The Audit Log page leads with stat cards for total events (all time), events today, unique actors, and highest-risk event count. A filter form above the table has two rows: row one contains actor email input, action type multi-select, resource type select, and IP address input; row two contains date-from datetime-local input, date-to datetime-local input, risk level checkbox group (info/low/medium/high/critical), and outcome radio group (all/success/failure). The main table is 8 columns × 30 rows with sticky header, listing event ID in monospace, timestamp, actor email, action performed, resource affected, source IP in monospace, risk level badge (color-coded per level), and outcome icon-text; rows with high/critical risk have a left border 3px solid #f5a623 highlight. A pagination control strip below the table shows rows-per-page select (25/50/100), current range readout, and prev/next styled buttons.
